question: What mechanism does Jue Wang identify in “The Determinants of FDI Spillover” that deepens the evidence from “An absorptive capacity theory of knowledge spillover entrepreneurship”?

evidence_spans.text: Based on the network approach,the main motivation of the paper is to analysis the determinants of FDI spillover from the questionnaire surveys.It showed that the role of foreign - owned subsidiaries significantly affects the knowledge spillover.It also found the communication within knowledge,product,management and marketing with the local firms is the key channel of knowledge spillover instead of labor turnover in China.Thus,it is very important to setup the network platform to facilitate the multi -tiers exchanges between domestic firms and foreign subsidiaries.Some other results include:(1 ) the spillover effect is more significant for subsidiary with appropriate technology;(2 ) the deeper cooperation with foreign - owned firm,the more spillover effect the local firm acquires;(3 ) the more spillover effect is from industrialized countries comparing with the other countries;(4) the spi

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Spillover effect, Subsidiary through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 139 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
